name: Katish's Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tablespoons Unsalted butter, cut into bits
Thin slices of lemon for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the zwieback, butter, and sugar until well combined. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, beat together the sugar and cream cheese until light and fluffy. Add the flour, salt, vanilla bean, and egg yolks (beaten lightly), and combine well.
3. Stir in the sour cream. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until they form stiff peaks. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cream cheese mixture.
4. Pour the filling over the crust in the springform pan. Run a rubber spatula around the inside of the pan about one inch from the rim to help the cake rise evenly.
5. Bake the cheesecake in the center of a preheated 350°F oven for 60 minutes. Turn off the heat and let the cheesecake stand in the oven with the door closed for 30 more minutes.
6. Let the cheesecake cool completely at room temperature, or until set, then chill it covered overnight in the refrigerator.
7. Remove from the pan, garnish with lemon slices, and serve.
